name: Windows Roadmap 300 P1 Batch 02
description: Executable batch generated directly from the Windows 300-scenario roadmap.

tests.name: Disable or Modify Tools: driver backed
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded
